license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8y3hxyn
title: RNA clean-up by phenol:chloroform
author: Daniel J. Richter

steps_raw.instruction: Add 40 μL (1/10 of final volume) of 3 M sodium acetate, pH 5.2. Final concentration will be 0.3 M. undetermined, 3 M sodium acetate, pH 5.2
Add 880 μL (2x volume) of phenol:chloroform:isoamyl alcohol pH 8.0 undetermined
Shake vigorously inside fume hood for 15 seconds. 00:00:15, Shake
Centrifuge at maximum speed in a microcentrifuge at 4° C, for 2 minutes. 00:02:00, centrifuge
Check solution for insoluble precipitate, indicating the presence of potassium salts > 20 mM.
Transfer 420 μL of the top aqueous phase to a new tube. undetermined, Transferred into a new tube.
Add 840 μL of chloroform:isoamyl alcohol pH 8.0
Shake vigorously inside fume hood for 15 seconds. 00:00:15, Shake
Centrifuge at max speed for 2 minutes at 4ºC. 00:02:00, Centrifuge
Transfer 400 µL of the top aqueous phase to a new tube.
Add 1.5 µL of GlycoBlue. Final amount ~ 25 micrograms, working stock 15 micrograms/microliter. undetermined, GlycoBlue
Add 1000 µl (2.5 volumes) of 100% ethanol undetermined
Shake vigorously inside fume hood for 15 seconds. 00:00:15, Shake
Freeze overnight at -20°C.
Centrifuge at maximum speed for 10 minutes at 4°C. 00:10:00, Centrifuge
Pipette out ethanol, slowly, with P1000 then P10. Avoid leaving liquid on sides of the tube.
Wash with -20 °C, 70% ethanol and centrifuge at maximum speed for 5 minutes at 4° C. 00:05:00
Pipette out ethanol, slowly, with P1000, then P10. Avoid leaving liquid on sides of tube.
Dry pellet and resuspend in 27.5 µL of water. undetermined, Water
Spec on NanoDrop and dilute 1 µL aliquot of RNA to 1 ng/µL in a separate tube (for Bioanalyzer)
